summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held their regular meeting covering American Recovery Plan (ARP) fund reallocations, road paving updates, employee evaluation process changes, and various administrative items. The board recognized Linda Griffin with a community honor, discussed upcoming zoning review meetings, approved a school resource officer contract with Goshen Local Schools, and entered executive session with no resulting actions.
decisions: Approved payment of bills for April 27 through May 10, 2022
Approved reallocation of $73,999 in ARP funds for vehicle purchases (Hodges abstained)
Approved reallocation of $18,828 in ARP funds for road signs
Reappointed Bill Tudor and Jessica Holmes to the Goshen Park Board for three-year terms (May 2022–May 2025)
Accepted $50 donation from Shannon and Esther Wilde
Approved 2022-2023 school resource officers contract with Goshen Local Schools
Declared surplus and approved sale on GovDeal of six laptop mounts and one vehicle gun mount
Entered executive session at 7:47 PM; no motions resulted
action_items: Administrator Pegram to coordinate with Harry and Mike to schedule a special zoning/land use review meeting, targeting June 14 or June 12 as backup
Paving bids to go out in June for 2022 and 2023 road projects including Thompson and Gibbs (OPWC grant roads)
Administration building facade project started; roof project planned for late summer
Staff to get pictures of Ranger for surplus listing on GovDeal
Administrator Pegram to keep board updated on land bank redevelopment progress
key_amounts: $73,999 ARP funds reallocated for vehicle purchases
$18,828 ARP funds reallocated for road signs
$50 donation from Shannon and Esther Wilde
OPWC grant awarded for Thompson and Gibbs roads (50/50 match with state)
notable_topics: American Recovery Plan (ARP) fund allocations and project updates
Road paving plan combining 2022 and 2023 projects with OPWC grant
Administration building facade and roof renovation projects
Recognition of Linda Griffin as community honoree
Police department commended for solving Dollar General robbery
School resource officers contract renewal with Goshen Local Schools
Upcoming zoning and land use plan review discussion
attendees: Shannon and Esther Wilde (donors, not present)
notes: Transcript contains significant repetitive auto-generated artifacts making some portions unintelligible. A special zoning meeting is scheduled for June 1. The board expressed urgency about reviewing zoning for subdivisions and the land use plan, with discussion about scheduling a dedicated meeting. Trustee Hodges abstained on the $73,999 ARP reallocation vote. Executive session lasted approximately 1 hour 40 minutes (7:47 PM to 9:27 PM).
title: Goshen Twp. BOT Mtg 5.10.22
